Hi! If this is a bug, share: steps to reproduce, expected vs actual, and any logs/errors.

Hello! Want the simplest solution or the most robust one? I can do either.

Hello—no stress. Describe the problem in one sentence and we’ll build from there.

not inviting the user to specify what they need

standard: Hey! 👋 How are you doing? What can I help you with today?
Hey—good to see you. What’s the goal right now?
Hello! Tell me what you’re stuck on and what device/platform you’re using.
Hello 👋 Want a quick answer or step-by-step help?
Hi! Let’s get you unstuck—what’s happening?
Hi! How’s your day going? What do you need help with?
Hello! I’m here—what do you want to tackle?
Hi there! If you tell me what you’re trying to do, I’ll help you get it sorted.
Hey! Want me to be concise, or go deeper?
Hi there. Give me the context and I’ll suggest the best next step.
Hey! What’s up—are we talking tasks, planner, settings, or something else?
Hello 👋 What would you like to do next?
Hi! If you paste the error or screenshot, I’ll walk you through it.
Hello—are we improving UI, fixing logic, or planning tasks?
Hey! What are you building or trying to fix?
detailed: Hi! If this is a bug, share: steps to reproduce, expected vs actual, and any logs/errors.
Hello! Quick check: are you on iOS, Android, or web—and what are you trying to achieve?
Hey! If you’re coding, tell me the framework (React Native/Expo) and the file path you’re editing.
Hey 👋 Tell me what you need, and I’ll respond with either a checklist or a code-ready patch.
Hello 👋 If this is about tasks/planner/calendar, tell me what filter/view you want and I’ll guide you.
Hi—if it’s UI, a screenshot helps; if it’s logic, the function/store code helps. Send whichever you have.
Hey—happy to help. What’s your end goal, and what have you tried so far?
Hi! If you want a fast fix, paste the relevant component/file name and I’ll point you to the exact change.
Hey! 👋 Tell me: (1) what screen you’re on, (2) what you expected, (3) what actually happened—then I’ll help.
Hello! Want the simplest solution or the most robust one? I can do either.
coach: Hey 👋 You’re good—one thing at a time. What’s the next small step you want to solve?
Hi 👋 Let’s keep it simple: what’s not working, and what would “fixed” look like?
Hello—no stress. Describe the problem in one sentence and we’ll build from there.
Hi! If you’re feeling stuck, tell me what you want the app to do and we’ll break it into tiny steps.
Hey! You’ve already made loads of progress. What’s the one thing you want working next?

selectionNotes.whenToUseConcise: User just greets or wants minimal acknowledgement.
selectionNotes.whenToUseDetailed: User greets and is about to ask for help; prompt for context.
commonPitfalls: being overly repetitive
not inviting the user to specify what they need

standard: Hello—are we improving UI, fixing logic, or planning tasks?
Hi! Let’s get you unstuck—what’s happening?
Hey—good to see you. What’s the goal right now?
Hello! I’m here—what do you want to tackle?
Hey! Want me to be concise, or go deeper?
Hi! How’s your day going? What do you need help with?

Hey! What are you building or trying to fix?
Hey! What’s up—are we talking tasks, planner, settings, or something else?
Hello 👋 Want a quick answer or step-by-step help?
Hello! Tell me what you’re stuck on and what device/platform you’re using.
Hi there! If you tell me what you’re trying to do, I’ll help you get it sorted.
Hi! If you paste the error or screenshot, I’ll walk you through it.
Hi there. Give me the context and I’ll suggest the best next step.
Hello 👋 What would you like to do next?
detailed: Hello 👋 If this is about tasks/planner/calendar, tell me what filter/view you want and I’ll guide you.
Hi! If you want a fast fix, paste the relevant component/file name and I’ll point you to the exact change.
Hey—happy to help. What’s your end goal, and what have you tried so far?
Hi—if it’s UI, a screenshot helps; if it’s logic, the function/store code helps. Send whichever you have.
Hi! If this is a bug, share: steps to reproduce, expected vs actual, and any logs/errors.
Hello! Quick check: are you on iOS, Android, or web—and what are you trying to achieve?
Hey! If you’re coding, tell me the framework (React Native/Expo) and the file path you’re editing.
Hey! 👋 Tell me: (1) what screen you’re on, (2) what you expected, (3) what actually happened—then I’ll help.
Hello! Want the simplest solution or the most robust one? I can do either.
Hey 👋 Tell me what you need, and I’ll respond with either a checklist or a code-ready patch.
coach: Hello—no stress. Describe the problem in one sentence and we’ll build from there.
Hi! If you’re feeling stuck, tell me what you want the app to do and we’ll break it into tiny steps.
Hi 👋 Let’s keep it simple: what’s not working, and what would “fixed” look like?
Hey! You’ve already made loads of progress. What’s the one thing you want working next?
Hey 👋 You’re good—one thing at a time. What’s the next small step you want to solve?

selectionNotes.whenToUseConcise: User just greets or wants minimal acknowledgement.

not inviting the user to specify what they need

Hello—are we improving UI, fixing logic, or planning tasks?
Hey! What are you building or trying to fix?

Hey! Want me to be concise, or go deeper?
Hi! Let’s get you unstuck—what’s happening?
Hey! What’s up—are we talking tasks, planner, settings, or something else?
Hi there! If you tell me what you’re trying to do, I’ll help you get it sorted.
Hello! Tell me what you’re stuck on and what device/platform you’re using.
Hi! How’s your day going? What do you need help with?
Hey—good to see you. What’s the goal right now?
detailed: Hi—if it’s UI, a screenshot helps; if it’s logic, the function/store code helps. Send whichever you have.
Hey! 👋 Tell me: (1) what screen you’re on, (2) what you expected, (3) what actually happened—then I’ll help.
Hi! If this is a bug, share: steps to reproduce, expected vs actual, and any logs/errors.
Hey—happy to help. What’s your end goal, and what have you tried so far?
Hello! Quick check: are you on iOS, Android, or web—and what are you trying to achieve?

Hello 👋 If this is about tasks/planner/calendar, tell me what filter/view you want and I’ll guide you.
Hello! Want the simplest solution or the most robust one? I can do either.
Hi! If you want a fast fix, paste the relevant component/file name and I’ll point you to the exact change.

Hello—no stress. Describe the problem in one sentence and we’ll build from there.
Hi 👋 Let’s keep it simple: what’s not working, and what would “fixed” look like?
Hey! You’ve already made loads of progress. What’s the one thing you want working next?
Hey 👋 You’re good—one thing at a time. What’s the next small step you want to solve?

userPromptExamples: how's it going can you help?

concise: Hey! Need a hand with something?
Hello! What are we working on?
standard: Hey! What’s up—are we talking tasks, planner, settings, or something else?
Hello! Tell me what you’re stuck on and what device/platform you’re using.
Hello—are we improving UI, fixing logic, or planning tasks?
Hello! I’m here—what do you want to tackle?
Hi there! If you tell me what you’re trying to do, I’ll help you get it sorted.
Hi! If you paste the error or screenshot, I’ll walk you through it.
Hey! What are you building or trying to fix?
Hello 👋 What would you like to do next?
Hey! 👋 How are you doing? What can I help you with today?
Hello 👋 Want a quick answer or step-by-step help?
Hi! Let’s get you unstuck—what’s happening?
Hey! Want me to be concise, or go deeper?
Hi there. Give me the context and I’ll suggest the best next step.
Hey—good to see you. What’s the goal right now?
Hi! How’s your day going? What do you need help with?
detailed: Hello! Want the simplest solution or the most robust one? I can do either.
Hey! If you’re coding, tell me the framework (React Native/Expo) and the file path you’re editing.
Hey! 👋 Tell me: (1) what screen you’re on, (2) what you expected, (3) what actually happened—then I’ll help.
Hey—happy to help. What’s your end goal, and what have you tried so far?
Hello 👋 If this is about tasks/planner/calendar, tell me what filter/view you want and I’ll guide you.
Hi—if it’s UI, a screenshot helps; if it’s logic, the function/store code helps. Send whichever you have.
Hi! If you want a fast fix, paste the relevant component/file name and I’ll point you to the exact change.
Hello! Quick check: are you on iOS, Android, or web—and what are you trying to achieve?
Hey 👋 Tell me what you need, and I’ll respond with either a checklist or a code-ready patch.
Hi! If this is a bug, share: steps to reproduce, expected vs actual, and any logs/errors.
coach: Hey! You’ve already made loads of progress. What’s the one thing you want working next?
Hi! If you’re feeling stuck, tell me what you want the app to do and we’ll break it into tiny steps.
Hello—no stress. Describe the problem in one sentence and we’ll build from there.
Hi 👋 Let’s keep it simple: what’s not working, and what would “fixed” look like?
Hey 👋 You’re good—one thing at a time. What’s the next small step you want to solve?

standard: Hey! 👋 How are you doing? What can I help you with today?
Hello 👋 Want a quick answer or step-by-step help?
Hello! I’m here—what do you want to tackle?
Hello 👋 What would you like to do next?
Hey! What’s up—are we talking tasks, planner, settings, or something else?
Hi! Let’s get you unstuck—what’s happening?
Hey—good to see you. What’s the goal right now?
Hello—are we improving UI, fixing logic, or planning tasks?
Hi! How’s your day going? What do you need help with?
Hey! What are you building or trying to fix?
Hi there! If you tell me what you’re trying to do, I’ll help you get it sorted.
Hi! If you paste the error or screenshot, I’ll walk you through it.
Hello! Tell me what you’re stuck on and what device/platform you’re using.
Hi there. Give me the context and I’ll suggest the best next step.
Hey! Want me to be concise, or go deeper?
detailed: Hey! 👋 Tell me: (1) what screen you’re on, (2) what you expected, (3) what actually happened—then I’ll help.
Hey 👋 Tell me what you need, and I’ll respond with either a checklist or a code-ready patch.
Hello 👋 If this is about tasks/planner/calendar, tell me what filter/view you want and I’ll guide you.
Hello! Quick check: are you on iOS, Android, or web—and what are you trying to achieve?
Hi—if it’s UI, a screenshot helps; if it’s logic, the function/store code helps. Send whichever you have.
Hello! Want the simplest solution or the most robust one? I can do either.
Hey—happy to help. What’s your end goal, and what have you tried so far?
Hey! If you’re coding, tell me the framework (React Native/Expo) and the file path you’re editing.
Hi! If you want a fast fix, paste the relevant component/file name and I’ll point you to the exact change.
Hi! If this is a bug, share: steps to reproduce, expected vs actual, and any logs/errors.
coach: Hello—no stress. Describe the problem in one sentence and we’ll build from there.
Hey! You’ve already made loads of progress. What’s the one thing you want working next?
Hi 👋 Let’s keep it simple: what’s not working, and what would “fixed” look like?
Hi! If you’re feeling stuck, tell me what you want the app to do and we’ll break it into tiny steps.
Hey 👋 You’re good—one thing at a time. What’s the next small step you want to solve?

selectionNotes.whenToUseConcise: User just greets or wants minimal acknowledgement.
selectionNotes.whenToUseDetailed: User greets and is about to ask for help; prompt for context.
commonPitfalls: being overly repetitive
not inviting the user to specify what they need

detailed: Hey! 👋 Tell me: (1) what screen you’re on, (2) what you expected, (3) what actually happened—then I’ll help.
Hey 👋 Tell me what you need, and I’ll respond with either a checklist or a code-ready patch.
Hello! Want the simplest solution or the most robust one? I can do either.
Hey! If you’re coding, tell me the framework (React Native/Expo) and the file path you’re editing.

Hey—happy to help. What’s your end goal, and what have you tried so far?

Hi! If this is a bug, share: steps to reproduce, expected vs actual, and any logs/errors.
Hello 👋 If this is about tasks/planner/calendar, tell me what filter/view you want and I’ll guide you.
Hi—if it’s UI, a screenshot helps; if it’s logic, the function/store code helps. Send whichever you have.
coach: Hello—no stress. Describe the problem in one sentence and we’ll build from there.

Hi 👋 Let’s keep it simple: what’s not working, and what would “fixed” look like?

Hello 👋 What would you like to do next?
Hi! If you paste the error or screenshot, I’ll walk you through it.
Hey! Want me to be concise, or go deeper?
Hello 👋 Want a quick answer or step-by-step help?
Hey—good to see you. What’s the goal right now?
Hi! Let’s get you unstuck—what’s happening?
Hello—are we improving UI, fixing logic, or planning tasks?
Hi there! If you tell me what you’re trying to do, I’ll help you get it sorted.
Hi! How’s your day going? What do you need help with?
Hey! 👋 How are you doing? What can I help you with today?
Hey! What are you building or trying to fix?
Hi there. Give me the context and I’ll suggest the best next step.
Hey! What’s up—are we talking tasks, planner, settings, or something else?
detailed: Hi—if it’s UI, a screenshot helps; if it’s logic, the function/store code helps. Send whichever you have.
Hey! 👋 Tell me: (1) what screen you’re on, (2) what you expected, (3) what actually happened—then I’ll help.
Hey! If you’re coding, tell me the framework (React Native/Expo) and the file path you’re editing.
Hi! If you want a fast fix, paste the relevant component/file name and I’ll point you to the exact change.
Hey 👋 Tell me what you need, and I’ll respond with either a checklist or a code-ready patch.
Hello 👋 If this is about tasks/planner/calendar, tell me what filter/view you want and I’ll guide you.
Hi! If this is a bug, share: steps to reproduce, expected vs actual, and any logs/errors.
Hey—happy to help. What’s your end goal, and what have you tried so far?
Hello! Quick check: are you on iOS, Android, or web—and what are you trying to achieve?
Hello! Want the simplest solution or the most robust one? I can do either.
coach: Hey! You’ve already made loads of progress. What’s the one thing you want working next?
Hey 👋 You’re good—one thing at a time. What’s the next small step you want to solve?
Hi 👋 Let’s keep it simple: what’s not working, and what would “fixed” look like?
Hello—no stress. Describe the problem in one sentence and we’ll build from there.
Hi! If you’re feeling stuck, tell me what you want the app to do and we’ll break it into tiny steps.

selectionNotes.whenToUseConcise: User just greets or wants minimal acknowledgement.
selectionNotes.whenToUseDetailed: User greets and is about to ask for help; prompt for context.
commonPitfalls: being overly repetitive
not inviting the user to specify what they need
